title: Luca Hemmerich
text: Home * People * Luca Hemmerich Luca Hemmerich , a German chess player and programmer. He was active in computer chess programming in 2009 and 2010 so far, when he developed his chess engine ChessMind at age 15 [1] [2] . Contents 1 Forum Posts 1.1 2009 1.2 2010 2 External Links 3 References Forum Posts [ edit ] 2009 [ edit ] Null-moves and zugzwang by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , September 25, 2009 Extensions/Reductions by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , September 28, 2009 Winning percentage and centipawns by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , November 18, 2009 » Pawn Advantage, Win Percentage, and Elo Transposition table pruning by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , November 25, 2009 2010 [ edit ] bitScanReverse32 by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , January 25, 2010 » BitScan Problems when implementing checks in qsearch by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , February 03, 2010 » Checks in Quiescence Search TT score by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , February 03, 2010 Problems with LMR in late endgames by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , March 01, 2010 » Late Move Reductions WAC.002 by evaluation? by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , April 18, 2010 » Connected Passed Pawns , Win at Chess New UCI engine: ChessMind by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , April 29, 2010 ChessMind 0.82 by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , June 04, 2010 External Links [ edit ] Hemmerich, Luca - FIDE Chess Profile References [ edit ] ↑ Re: Youngest author of an original engine? by Adam Hair , CCC , March 08, 2015 ↑ New UCI engine: ChessMind by Luca Hemmerich , CCC , April 29, 2010 Up one level
